issues.title: Enemy dealt 24 damage (55% of 44 HP) on floor 9
issues.description: At turn seq 592, floor 9 encounter 2, enemy dealt 24 damage when player had 44 HP. This is 55% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 24 damage (55% of player's 44 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: 3+ consecutive encounters with >90% HP remaining (floors 1-1)
issues.description: Encounters at F1E0, F1E1, F1E2 all ended with player HP above 72. HP remaining: 80, 80, 80. Enemies may be too weak for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP on these floors to create more tension

issues.title: Systemic combo cap at 3 — expert/speed-runner profile cannot reach higher combos
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (439 cards played, 91.34396355353076% accuracy). All 27 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. This is a systemic bug — the combo system appears hard-capped at 3, preventing expert players from achieving the designed 1.5x/2.0x multipliers at combo 4/5. This severely limits damage output and is likely the root cause of expert defeats.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 91.3% accuracy over 439 cards — combo system broken

reproductionSteps: Achieve 4+ consecutive correct answers in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — likely a reset or cap bug preventing combo > 3. Check if combo resets on turn boundary or is capped in encounter bridge.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: F2E0 took 8 turns (prev floor avg: 3.3)
issues.description: Encounter at floor 2 encounter 0 (crystal_golem, common) took 8 turns to resolve, which is 2.4x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth out enemy stat scaling between floors to avoid jarring difficulty jumps

issues.title: Difficulty spike: F3E2 took 14 turns (prev floor avg: 6.3)

issues.title: Expert/speed-runner defeated on floor 9 despite 91% accuracy
issues.description: expert profile with 91.3% accuracy was defeated on floor 9 after 27 encounters. With this level of skill, the player should be able to progress further. The combination of combo cap at 3 and enemy scaling likely makes late-game progression impossible even for skilled players.

evidence.metric: Defeat on floor 9 with 91.3% accuracy and maxCombo 3

issues.suggestedFix: Fix combo cap bug to unlock higher damage multipliers; review late-game enemy HP scaling
